question_en: List every Pokemon whose name contains '이상해'.
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p ?l WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon ; rdfs:label ?l . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?l), "이상해")) }

question_en: Which Pokemon have names starting with '리자'?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p ?l WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon ; rdfs:label ?l . FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?l), "리자")) }

PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT ?p ?l WHERE { ?p a pk:Pokemon ; rdfs:label ?l . FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?l), "거북")) }

question_en: Find the Pokemon most similar to Charizard (리자몽).
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { d:Charizard pk:hasType ?t . ?p a pk:Pokemon ; pk:hasType ?t . FILTER(?p != d:Charizard) }
gold_answer_ko: 파이리, 리자드 (같은 불꽃 타입·진화 계열), 피죤투 (비행 타입)
gold_answer_en: Charmander, Charmeleon (same Fire type/evolution line), Pidgeot (Flying)

question_en: Which Pokemon are similar to Squirtle (꼬부기)?
gold_sparql: PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { d:Squirtle pk:hasType ?t . ?p a pk:Pokemon ; pk:hasType ?t . FILTER(?p != d:Squirtle) }

PREFIX pk: <http://example.org/pokemon#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX d: <http://example.org/pokemon/data#> SELECT DISTINCT ?p WHERE { d:Bulbasaur pk:hasType ?t . ?p a pk:Pokemon ; pk:hasType ?t . FILTER(?p != d:Bulbasaur) }
